title: gladiolus ornatus
intro: Gladiolus ornatus, also known as the lesser sword lily, is a species of flowering plant in the iris family. It is native to tropical Africa and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral effects. The plant is said to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating respiratory problems, and treating wounds, due to its active compounds like flavonoids and saponins. Herbal preparations of Gladiolus ornatus are typically made by infusing the plant's flowers or roots in water to create teas, infusions, or tinctures that can be used to treat various ailments.
